вң… Image compression and format conversion

вң… ZIP archive creation and extraction
вң… Video and audio editing
вң… Text case conversion and formatting
вң… Code formatting and beautification
вң… JSON/YAML conversion and formatting
вң… QR code and barcode generation/scanning

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 235 рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ

рҹ”Қ 0 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

BrowseryTools is a collection of over 80 browser-based utility tools built with Next.js and TypeScript. These tools operate entirely client-side, ensuring user privacy and eliminating the need for server uploads or accounts. They cover a wide range of functionalities including image manipulation, file conversion, text processing, data handling, and calculations.

рҹ”— рқ—ҹрқ—ңрқ—Ўрқ—һрқ—Ұ
вҖў рқ—ҡрқ—¶рқҳҒрқ—ӣрқҳӮрқ—Ҝ: https://github.com/aghyad97/browserytools

This project brings Wallpaper Engine-style live wallpapers to Linux, allowing users to run animated wallpapers from Steam's Wallpaper Engine on their desktop. It's an educational OpenGL-based wallpaper engine for Linux.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Unity MCP is a C# integration tool that bridges AI assistants with the Unity Editor. It allows LLMs to directly manage Unity assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate development tasks through the Model Context Protocol.

Constrict is a desktop application designed to compress video files to a specific target file size. It automates the process of calculating necessary encoding parameters like bitrate, resolution, and framerate, offering a user-friendly interface for bulk video compression.
